command:
Create a high-quality editorial knowledge graphic for an X Article.
All on-canvas text must be in Simplified Chinese only, except unavoidable product or model names.
Do not use English headings, translated body text, UI labels, or bilingual duplication unless explicitly requested.
Role: inline.
Image grammar: example_comparison.
Purpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block..
Diagram type: workflow_map.
Concept summary: berryxia 的分析里另一半更值得看。他的判断是：**Google 现在只需要接住这个球**。.
Style direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first; Bold editorial poster with oversized Chinese typography as hero element. High contrast, minimal illustration. The judgment IS the visual..
Background: warm cream paper-like background.
Primary accents: warm orange, coral red, teal green.
Line work: soft dark gray line work.
Scene elements: left card vs right card, center arrow, one bottom takeaway, few text blocks, two-column contrast with one takeaway strip, evidence markers aligned by criterion.
Key relationships to visualize: make the before/after or old/new contrast obvious, show why one example proves the point.
Layout pattern: comparison_matrix.
Diagram focus: before/after evidence contrast.
Text position: integrated.
Text budget: no more than 4 major text blocks on the image.
Headline budget: <= 12 Chinese characters.
Subheadline budget: <= 10 Chinese characters.
Label budget: <= 8 Chinese characters per label.
Label count budget: <= 6 labels.
On-canvas headline: "Google 面前的那…".
On-canvas subheadline: "一个具体例子就够了".
Use short Chinese labels only: 苹果用 Mac…, 这个证明对 G…, Google…, 工作流深度绑定….
Grammar rules: Use a left-vs-right or before-vs-after structure. One example should prove the section point immediately. Avoid extra supporting text blocks.
Must have: clear information hierarchy, diagram-first composition, short Chinese labels, editorial infographic feeling, high readability on mobile, ample whitespace and one dominant focal structure, flat color blocks with clear line hierarchy, layout-first visual storytelling instead of decorative art, section visuals must map to explicit layout grammar (hub-spoke / linear-progression / comparison-matrix / bento-grid), keep labels short, focus on one concept only, maintain same house style as cover, one image = one clear job, support section transition and comprehension reset.
Must avoid: generic AI wallpaper, cyberpunk neon, photorealistic people, blue digital rain, low-information decoration, busy ornamental textures that reduce readability, style drift between cover and inline images, paragraph-like dense text rendered inside image blocks, no decorative filler, no unrelated icons, no decorative image blocks without structural meaning.
Additional direction: Use the example_comparison grammar. This is one visual job, not a paragraph summary: Google 面前的那张入场券 Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: knowledge-base (infographic + vector-illustration). Inline image should behave like a section explainer card with fast scan value. Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: versus (comparison + vector-illustration). Use comparison-matrix thinking: align differences by one common axis..
The result should look like a premium creator-made article infographic, not generic AI art.
Keep the composition clean, explanatory, and mobile-legible.
Do not simply render the article's paragraph text into the image.
